Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}Everyone who's in the internship program, please follow me to the back entrance.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1}We'll provide you all with uniforms. Once everybody's dressed, we'll get to work![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}For the next four days, I'll be[n]helping out with cleaning...[n]{f 1 1}
